## Summary

What changed and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass with `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Documentation or examples were updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Any sample data is synthetic or anonymized
- [ ] OEE, downtime, or Pareto calculation changes include tests

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out calculation assumptions, data-format quirks, or compatibility concerns.
